## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] New notebook
- [ ] New project
- [ ] Bug fix (notebook code, broken links, etc.)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Resource addition (blog, course, paper)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Checklist

- [ ] All notebook cells execute without errors (Kernel > Restart & Run All)
- [ ] LaTeX formulas render correctly
- [ ] Visualizations have clear titles and labels
- [ ] Code follows PEP 8 style guidelines
- [ ] No API tokens or secrets are committed
- [ ] README is updated (if adding notebooks/projects/resources)
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines

## Screenshots / Outputs

If applicable, paste screenshots of notebook outputs or visualizations.

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)
